description: Maps every numeric claim in memo.md and blog_post_draft.md to its source artifact.

claims.notes: Reused as informational reference per week11.md instruction

claims.source: re-scoring of preference_pairs.jsonl with corrected evaluator (Style Guide v2)
Colab training run — v3, pure SimPO, 69 pairs

claims.notes: Pure SimPO PyTorch loss; final_margin=3.98, converged=True

claims.claim: SimPO margin converged to +3.98 (from negative at step 1)
claims.notes: converged=True; positive margin confirms model learned preference direction on 69 pairs

claims.source: Colab ablation — trained Qwen judge (v3, 69 pairs) scoring 40 held-out baseline emails vs corrected deterministic evaluator (Style Guide v2 banned phrases, word count, bench word check)
Colab ablation — trained judge (v3) vs raw Qwen backbone (no adapter) on same 40 held-out emails
claims.notes: Positive: excellence-tier training shifted judge above backbone; backbone is conservative by default

claims.claim: Delta B significant at alpha=0.05 (p < 0.0001, wins=37/40)

claims.notes: ~600 input tokens + 300 output tokens per task = ~$0.0004

claims.claim: 4.2% acceptance rate — Qwen judging Claude-generated tasks
78% acceptance when Claude judges Claude-generated tasks
v3 training data: 69 pairs (44 original + 25 excellence-tier)
claims.notes: Excellence-tier: chosen=ideal email (0.90-1.00), rejected=former v2 chosen (0.35-0.57)

claims.claim: Excellence-tier ideal email score: 0.90 (22 pairs) or 1.00 (1 pair, tb_train_0046)
claims.source: scoring_evaluator.py applied to IDEAL_EMAILS in build_ideal_pairs.py
claims.notes: sg=2,ta=3,cq=3,bf=3,pd=3 → 0.90; tb_train_0046 gets sg=3 via required_hedges → 1.00
All 25 new pairs exceed delta >= 0.20 threshold; previous v2 pairs averaged ~+0.22

claims.claim: v3 training completed: 69 pairs, 3 epochs, SimPO loss=0.52, margin=3.98, converged=True, elapsed=269s
claims.notes: Pure SimPO PyTorch loop (no TRL); v3 ablation complete — results in ablation_results.json and significance.json
